heading: Limitation on foreign assistance appropriations
label: 2412 Limitation on foreign assistance appropriations
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , , known as the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961, which comprises this chapter.Pub. L. 87–19575 Stat. 424Sept. 4, 1961
amendments: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , , known as the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961, which comprises this chapter.Pub. L. 87–19575 Stat. 424Sept. 4, 1961

children.heading: Restrictions on appropriations in absence of or in excess of prior authorizations
children.label: a Restrictions on appropriations in absence of or in excess of prior authorizations

children.text: unless the appropriation thereof has been previously authorized by law; or
in excess of an amount previously prescribed by law.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: To the extent that legislation enacted after the making of an appropriation for foreign assistance (including foreign military sales) authorizes the obligation or expenditure thereof, the limitation contained in subsection (a) shall have no effect.

children.heading: Specific repeal or modification of section
children.label: c Specific repeal or modification of section
children.text: The provisions of this section shall not be superseded except by a provision of law enacted after , which specifically repeals or modifies the provisions of this section.January 12, 1971
